# F063 Train-Only Residual-Cone Selector

## Decision
`F063_TRAIN_CONE_SELECTOR_HELDOUT_BELOW_FLOOR`

## Purpose
F062 proved residual-cone capacity under held-out oracle selection. F063 removes the oracle: cone mix and row-wise abstention are selected using train-only evidence, then held-out rows are scored once.

## Selection Rule
Cone mix selected using train-only row-wise abstention metrics; held-out rows scored once after selection.

## Mean Metrics
- train safe nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- selected nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- selected cone mix mean: `0.083333`
- row-wise effective scale mean: `0.022222`
- heldout local floor preserved: `False`
- active gates pass: `True`
- selected transition: `0.430926`
- floor transition: `0.431808`
- selected delta cosine: `0.883299`
- floor delta cosine: `0.883381`
- selected recall@1: `0.765432`
- floor recall@1: `0.765432`
- selected floor gap transition: `-0.000882` (min `-0.003157`, std `0.001615`)
- selected floor gap delta cosine: `-0.000082` (min `-0.001210`, std `0.000843`)
- selected floor gap recall: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`)
- heldout broken rows: `0`

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. F063 is a fresh-seed diagnostic for a train-only cone selector.
